title: Operate mobile underwater vehicles
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate mobile underwater vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for mobile underwater vehicle operations

pcs.text: Clarify the aim/objective and precise location/s of the activity with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify the aim/objective and precise location/s of the activity with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify the aim/objective and precise location/s of the activity with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify personnel involved and confirm their skills and experience in underwater vehicle operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify personnel involved and confirm their skills and experience in underwater vehicle operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify personnel involved and confirm their skills and experience in underwater vehicle operations.

pcs.text: Identify and prepare mobile underwater vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prepare mobile underwater vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prepare mobile underwater vehicle.

pcs.text: Identify and check associated equipment and support resources required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and check associated equipment and support resources required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and check associated equipment and support resources required.

pcs.text: Identify and interpret information relating to underwater location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and interpret information relating to underwater location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and interpret information relating to underwater location.

pcs.text: Identify operational constraints under marine regulations and workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify operational constraints under marine regulations and workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify operational constraints under marine regulations and workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Identify operational threats and contingencies, and mitigate threats to deployment of underwater vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify operational threats and contingencies, and mitigate threats to deployment of underwater vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify operational threats and contingencies, and mitigate threats to deployment of underwater vehicle.

pcs.text: Confirm compliance with operating procedures and ensure a workplace health and safety risk assessment is performed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm compliance with operating procedures and ensure a workplace health and safety risk assessment is performed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm compliance with operating procedures and ensure a workplace health and safety risk assessment is performed.

elements.title: Operate mobile underwater vehicle

pcs.text: Transport mobile underwater vehicle to location

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and conduct pre-dive checks on mobile underwater vehicle on location according to operator instructions and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Deploy and operate mobile underwater vehicle safely according to operational plan and workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deploy and operate mobile underwater vehicle safely according to operational plan and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor operational threats, adjust operating parameters and respond to contingency situations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor operational threats, adjust operating parameters and respond to contingency situations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor operational threats, adjust operating parameters and respond to contingency situations.

pcs.text: Retrieve and secure mobile underwater vehicle and associated equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Retrieve and secure mobile underwater vehicle and associated equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Retrieve and secure mobile underwater vehicle and associated equipment.

elements.title: Complete underwater vehicle operations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store underwater vehicle and equipment according to operator instructions and biosecurity procedures.
